data.title: TD SYNNEX Q1 revenue surpasses expectations
data.description: The distribution section of the business grew by 17% to $22 billion, TD SYNNEX told investors on its quarterly earnings call.

data.title: NozzlePro launches ecommerce capability for distributors
data.description: It also said its website upgrade helps purchasers — whether business or individuals — make "quick purchasing decisions without waiting on quotes or manual processing."

data.title: Kroger and Flashfood expand partnership to reduce food waste
data.description: Customers download the Flashfood app and peruse available items at nearby stores. They buy directly in the app (no money changes hands in-store), then head to the store to pick up their order.

data.title: Avalara adds integration with Clover for tax compliance
data.description: Once the integration launches later this year, Clover merchants will be able to automatically set aside sales tax each day and track their obligations in real time.

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond adds to list of acquisitions with F9 Brands deal
data.description: The retailer said it expects the roughly $150 million deal to close after an annual shareholder meeting in May 2026, as well as following "customary due diligence, definitive documentation, and regulatory approvals if needed."
